<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#ffffff">
<title>Dmytro Denysenko · Asper School of Business</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Merriweather:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* ════════════════════════════════════════
   ASPER / U of M BRAND TOKENS
   Primary gold:  #F0AB00
   Dark gold:     #C48D00
   Black:         #1A1A1A
   Dark gray:     #3D3D3D
   Mid gray:      #767676
   Light gray:    #F5F5F5
   Border:        #E0E0E0
   White:         #FFFFFF
   Chevron red accent used on Asper logo: kept as subtle brand nod
════════════════════════════════════════ */
:root {
  --gold:       #F0AB00;
  --gold-dk:    #C48D00;
  --gold-lt:    #FFF8E6;
  --gold-line:  rgba(240,171,0,0.35);
  --black:      #1A1A1A;
  --gray-dk:    #3D3D3D;
  --gray-mid:   #767676;
  --gray-lt:    #F5F5F5;
  --border:     #E0E0E0;
  --white:      #FFFFFF;
  --serif:  'Merriweather', Georgia, serif;
  --sans:   'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --r:  6px;
  --r2: 12px;
  --r3: 18px;
}

*, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; }

body {
  font-family: var(--sans);
  background: #EFEFEF;
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center;
  padding: 2rem 1rem 3rem;
}

/* ── CARD ── */
.card {
  width: 100%; max-width: 420px;
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--r3);
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.09), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  animation: rise 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both;
}
@keyframes rise { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }

/* ── HEADER ── */
.header {
  background: #8B1A2B;
  padding: 0 0 0 0;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Asper-style chevron pattern — decorative background */
.header-pattern {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; opacity: 0.07;
}
.header-pattern svg { position: absolute; right: -20px; top: -20px; width: 200px; height: 200px; }

/* Gold top bar */
.header-bar { height: 5px; background: var(--gold); width: 100%; }

.header-inner { padding: 24px 24px 22px; }

/* School badge */
.school-badge {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.school-badge-chevron {
  display: flex; gap: 2px;
}
.chevron-shape {
  width: 10px; height: 18px;
  background: var(--gold);
  clip-path: polygon(0 0, 60% 0, 100% 50%, 60% 100%, 0 100%, 40% 50%);
}
.chevron-shape:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0.6; }
.chevron-shape:nth-child(3) { opacity: 0.35; }
.school-name {
  font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); letter-spacing: 1.2px; text-transform: uppercase;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* Profile */
.profile { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.avatar {
  width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 10px;
  background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,
